---
name: Integration feedback
about: You pointed galdor at a real project — tell us where it hurt
title: 'Integration: <your project, one line>'
labels: integration-feedback
assignees: ''
---

galdor is pre-1.0 and looking for real integrations to shape it. This
template captures a build against your stack — the edges that only show up
in real deployments.

**What you built**
The agent / service, and which galdor pieces it used (provider, tools,
memory, council, mcp, structured output, observability, …).

**What worked well**
Where galdor got out of your way.

**Where it hurt**
Friction, missing pieces, confusing APIs, docs that didn't match reality.
Be specific — this is the most useful part.

**Workarounds**
What you had to do around galdor to get it working.

**Versions**
galdor version, provider(s), Go version (`galdor doctor`).
